units.content: Phone Book maps label strings to entity IDs and renders entity IDs to human-readable labels
Phone Book handles aliases and canonicalization
Phone Book is the user-facing name layer over the language-free coupling map core
Storage is in-memory, backed by universe.name and universe.tags
Persistence occurs via GraphEvent when aliases are added
The resolve method finds entities matching a given label with exact and alias matching
The resolve_fuzzy method accepts tau parameter for maximum fuzzy match distance
Fuzzy matching uses Levenshtein ratio to measure label similarity
The render method returns human-readable labels with different style options
add_alias method registers new label variants and records GraphEvent
add_alias checks for duplicate canonical names and existing aliases before adding
list_aliases returns all label variants with canonical name first
search method finds entities by substring match on normalized labels and aliases
search is more relaxed than resolve_fuzzy for finding matches
stats method counts total entities, aliases, indexed labels, and ambiguous labels
